posts.title: What should I do if I locked my keys in the car?
posts.body: I am in a parking lot and my phone is in the car too. No spare key nearby. What is the calmest order of steps?
posts.author: Jamie

answers.body: If you have roadside assistance (AAA, insurance app, car maker app), call them first. Many plans cover lockouts. If a pet or child is inside, call emergency services immediately. Otherwise use a reputable locksmith.
answers.author: mike_fixes

posts.title: First job interview in ten years — how do I prep in one evening?
posts.body: I have an interview tomorrow morning for an office admin role. I am rusty on how to present myself.
posts.author: returning_worker

answers.body: Skim the company site for their mission and one recent headline. Write 3 short stories: solving a problem, a busy day, and working with someone difficult. Prepare 2 questions for them about the team. Sleep beats cramming.
answers.author: hr_nomad
